name: PBFGen
description: PBFGen: Convert mass spectrometry data files to PBF format for Informed Proteomics

output_dir.label: Output Directory
output_dir.description: Output directory (defaults to input file directory)

start_scan.label: Start Scan
start_scan.description: Start scan number to limit scan range

end_scan.label: End Scan
end_scan.description: End scan number to limit scan range

param_file.label: Parameter File
param_file.description: Path to a file containing program parameters

create_param_file.label: Create Parameter File
create_param_file.description: Create an example parameter file. Can supply a path; if path is not supplied, the example parameter file content will output to the console.
